2603.28512.title: TIEG-Youpu Solution for NeurIPS 2022 WikiKG90Mv2-LSC
2603.28512.paper_summary: WikiKG90Mv2 in NeurIPS 2022 is a large encyclopedic knowledge graph. Embedding knowledge graphs into continuous vector spaces is important for many practical applications, such as knowledge acquisition, question answering, and recommendation systems. Compared to existing knowledge graphs, WikiKG90Mv2 is a large scale knowledge graph, which is composed of more than 90 millions of entities. Both efficiency and accuracy should be considered when building graph embedding models for knowledge graph at scale. To this end, we follow the retrieve then re-rank pipeline, and make novel modifications in both retrieval and re-ranking stage. Specifically, we propose a priority infilling retrieval model to obtain candidates that are structurally and semantically similar. Then we propose an ensemble based re-ranking model with neighbor enhanced representations to produce final link prediction results among retrieved candidates. Experimental results show that our proposed method outperforms existing baseline methods and improves MRR of validation set from 0.2342 to 0.2839.
2603.28512.paper_summary_zh: WikiKG90Mv2 在 NeurIPS 2022 是一個大型的百科知識圖譜。<lb/>將知識圖譜嵌入連續向量空間對於許多實際應用是重要的，例如知識獲取、問題回答和推薦系統。<lb/>與現有的知識圖譜相比，WikiKG90Mv2 是一個大規模的知識圖譜，包含超過 9000 萬個實體。<lb/>在為大規模知識圖譜構建圖嵌入模型時，效率和準確性都應該被考慮。<lb/>為此，我們遵循檢索然後重新排序的流程，並在檢索和重新排序階段進行了新穎的修改。<lb/>具體來說，我們提出了一種優先填充檢索模型，以獲取在結構和語義上相似的候選者。<lb/>然後，我們提出了一種基於集成的重新排序模型，使用鄰居增強表示來產生在檢索候選者之間的最終鏈接預測結果。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，我們提出的方法超越了現有的基準方法，並將驗證集的 MRR 從 0.2342 提高到 0.2839。
2603.28512.author: Feng Nie et.al.
2603.28512.authors: Feng Nie, Zhixiu Ye, Sifa Xie, Shuang Wu, Xin Yuan, Liang Yao, Jiazhen Peng, Xu Cheng
